{{Infobox technique
| name = soulfire
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[soulfire Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Soulfire]] is a specialized form of distilled [[vital aura]] that serves as the defining characteristic and power source for Underlords. It acts as a transitional bridge between the [[madra]] system and higher levels of existence, allowing users to exert their will directly upon the world. Visually, it often appears as a colorless or gray flame, though its color can change based on its grade or application; for instance, higher-level soulfire may appear as silver, blue-white, or reflective chrome. The strength and quality of soulfire vary by rank, with [[Archlord soulfire]] being the highest known form. This energy serves several critical functions. It is used to empower and enhance techniques, making them significantly more potent, dense, and impactful. In combat, it can be infused into weapons to increase their pressure or used to bolster physical movements and defenses. Beyond combat, soulfire is essential for [[Soulsmithing]], where it is used to temper artifacts and create high-level tools. It also plays a vital role in physical and spiritual refinement; when channeled through the body, it can cleanse impurities from the spirit, rebuild madra channels, and reinforce bones and organs, effectively remaking the user's physical vessel.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Soulfire]] is a gray-white, half-transparent flame that is perfectly round and spins slowly.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses stockpiled [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Soulfire]] can be used to make mundane materials like iron stronger and allow them to conduct [[madra]] and [[aura]] more efficiently.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Soulfire]] is a gray, almost colorless flame that can be ignited on fingertips.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Soulfire]] is a type of energy used to fuel seals.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Soulfire]] is a specific type of energy used to refine the physical vessel, empower [[madra]], and burn away impurities. Those ranked as Underlords or higher undergo a process where their bodies are reforged by this power. [[Eithan]] is capable of utilizing soulfire to augment his [[Enforcer technique]]. Following his advancement to [[Truegold]], [[Lindon]] will eventually require soulfire to reforge both his spirit and his body.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Underlords and above have their bodies reforged by [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Soulfire]] is a type of energy/power.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] can use [[soulfire]] to empower his [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] will need to reforge his body and spirit in [[soulfire]] after [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Soulfire]] burns away impurities, refines the physical vessel, and empowers [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soulfire]] is a specialized energy created by connecting to the surrounding world and serves as the true hallmark of an [[Underlord]]. This power is utilized by Underlords to burn treasures for advancement and can be woven as a type of energy by [[Yerin]]. During various battles, [[Kiro]] has drawn upon his reserves to power [[Striker techniques]] from his hands, while [[Lindon]] has used the energy to retreat the pressure of [[sword aura]] and inject it into the [[Titan’s Blade]] technique. Beyond combat, soulfire is present within [[Lindon]]'s spirit, where it forms a bridge to the [[aura]] and functions to rebuild a person's lifeline during advancement. Additionally, this energy is capable of being absorbed by [[emerald]] [[madra]] leaves.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soulfire]] is a by-product of connecting to the world around you.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soulfire]] is considered the real mark of an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Underlords burn treasures for [[soulfire]] to progress through advancement.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]] drew on his reserve of [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soulfire]] is a type of energy [[Yerin]] can weave.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soulfire]] is absorbed by [[emerald]] [[madra]] leaves.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soulfire]] is present in [[Lindon]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soulfire]] rebuilds a person's lifeline during advancement.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s [[soulfire]] forms a bridge between his spirit and the [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soulfire]] can be injected into the [[Titan’s Blade]] technique.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]] released a [[Striker technique]] from his left hand by pouring [[soulfire]] into it.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses [[soulfire]] to retreat the pressure of [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Soulfire]] functions as a specialized type of enhancement used by various practitioners. [[Lindon]] utilizes gray soulfire alongside [[pure madra]], eventually pouring the substance into his right hand. During combat, [[Pride]] combines [[madra]] and soulfire into a single blow, while Sophara employs it to support her [[Enforcer technique]]. Other notable applications include [[Eithan]] reinforcing his [[pure madra]] with soulfire, a [[dragon]] resonating with its own [[essence]], and the [[Sword Sage]] integrating concentrated [[aura]], [[madra]], and soulfire into a technique.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses gray soulfire in conjunction with [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[dragon]] resonates with its [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]]'s [[pure madra]] was reinforced with [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Pride]] pours [[madra]] and [[soulfire]] into a blow.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Sophara uses [[soulfire]] to assist her [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Soulfire]] is a type of enhancement.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sword Sage]]'s technique involves concentrated [[aura]], [[madra]], and [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] pours [[soulfire]] into his right hand.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Soulfire]] serves as a fundamental energy that can be infused into techniques to increase their scale and brightness. While [[Adama]] has undergone three rebirths within this energy, other practitioners utilize it for diverse purposes, such as [[Sha Miara]] hurling a piano with [[aura]] controlled by soulfire or Sophara using it to repel a [[dream aura]]. The energy is central to progression, as Underlords advance by condensing it and Sophara taps into her own reserves to begin her advancement. Various individuals interact with this force in unique ways, including [[Ziel]], who has already experienced his revelations, and [[Eithan]], whose soulfire resonates with the surrounding [[aura]]. Finally, [[Yerin]] demonstrates mastery by bridging her soulfire with nearby artifacts and using the energy to empower her [[Flowing Sword]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Adama]]'s body has been thrice reborn in [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Soulfire]] can be infused into techniques to make them larger and brighter.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sha Miara]] uses [[soulfire]]-controlled [[aura]] to hurl a piano.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara taps into her [[soulfire]] to begin advancement.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Underlords advance by condensing their [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]'s [[soulfire]] resonates with surrounding [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ziel]] has already passed his [[soulfire]] revelations.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara used [[soulfire]] to push away a [[dream aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] creates a bridge between her [[soulfire]] and the artifacts around her.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara has control over [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Soulfire]] empowers [[Yerin]]'s [[Flowing Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|During the conflict, [[Eithan]] utilized soulfire to bolster his [[Archlord]] body. Simultaneously, [[Yerin]] infused her swords with both [[madra]] and soulfire to enhance them. As the battle progressed, the presence of soulfire caused [[Orthos]]'s body to expand through burning. It was determined that this energy is a necessary substance to reverse [[Orthos]]'s increased size, though [[Eithan]] eventually exhausted his own supply of soulfire to facilitate his healing.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] used [[soulfire]] to strengthen his [[Archlord]] body.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is filling her swords with [[madra]] and [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Soulfire]] expands [[Orthos]]'s body as it burns.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Soulfire]] is a substance or energy needed to reverse [[Orthos]]'s size.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] used up his [[soulfire]] to heal himself.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulfire]] serves as a vital force required for [[Orthos]] to change in size, though its specific ways remain unknown to Truegolds. Various practitioners utilize the power, such as [[Yerin]] reinforcing her grass darts and [[Lindon]] using it to manipulate air or infuse his [[Empty Palm]] technique. The substance allows [[Jai Long]] to burst techniques and carries through his very veins, while others like [[Mercy]] use it for air control and [[Ziel]] burn through it to fuel abilities. [[Lindon]] has also employed soulfire to fuse dream madra into [[Dross]]' spirit, and he continues to consider its use while desiring more of the power.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulfire]] is required for [[Orthos]] to grow and shrink.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] reinforces her grass darts with [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses [[soulfire]] to manipulate air.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The ways of [[soulfire]] are unknown to Truegolds.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] can use [[soulfire]] to burst techniques.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] fused a loop of dream madra to [[Dross]]' spirit using [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] uses [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulfire]] bathes [[Lindon]]'s technique.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] poured [[soulfire]] into his defenses.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] can control the air with her [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulfire]] is a power [[Lindon]] considers using.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ziel]] burns through [[soulfire]] to power his abilities.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used a [[soulfire]]-infused [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] wants more [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulfire]] is a power running through [[Jai Long]]'s veins.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Soulfire]] is needed to help [[Orthos]] reach [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Soulfire]] manifests as a silver rush of energy that can be utilized in various ways. During the events involving [[Little Blue]], the entity proved capable of handling an additional dose of [[Lindon]]'s soulfire, though [[Lindon]]'s own reserves eventually dipped low. [[Mercy]] was able to store sparks of this energy while cycling [[madra]], and within [[Orthos]]'s spirit, the [[Archlord]]'s [[natural treasures]] were converted into soulfire. The power was later integrated into [[Lindon]]'s [[Blackflame]] blast, while Reigan burned the substance to undergo a transformation into his original form.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] can handle another dose of [[Lindon]]'s [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] stores sparks of [[soulfire]] while cycling [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s [[soulfire]] dipped low.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Archlord natural treasures]] turned into [[soulfire]] in [[Orthos]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Soulfire]] is a silver rush of energy.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses [[soulfire]] in his [[Blackflame]] blast.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan burned [[soulfire]] to transform into his original form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Soulfire]] gave birth to Reigan's [[Lord]] body.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] ignites his [[soulfire]] to begin a transformation.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Meira]] spins [[soulfire]] during her training.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
